mb-4","children":"Layout directly impacts how many customers you can serve and how fast your staff can restock. The most efficient layouts follow a few simple rules derived from community testing."}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"space-y-3 text-[#5a6370]","children":[["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"•"}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group by category:"}]," Keep snacks together, drinks together, and frozen items near freezers. Customers find what they want faster, and restocking is more efficient."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"•"}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"High-demand items at the back:"}]," Place snacks and drinks toward the rear. Customers walk past other shelves, increasing impulse purchases."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"•"}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Leave aisle space:"}]," Do not cram shelves together. Customers and staff need room to move. Two-tile aisles minimum."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"•"}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Checkout near the exit:"}]," Always place the register close to the door. Long walks to checkout reduce customer patience."]}]]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4","children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M4 16v-2.38C4 11.5 2.97 10.5 3 8c.03-2.72 1.49-6 4.5-6C9.37 2 10 3.8 10 5.5c0 3.11-2 5.66-2 8.68V16a2 2 0 1 1-4 0Z","key":"1dudjm"}],["path",{"d":"M20 20v-2.38c0-2.12 1.03-3.12 1-5.62-.03-2.72-1.49-6-4.5-6C14.63 6 14 7.8 14 9.5c0 3.11 2 5.66 2 8.68V20a2 2 0 1 0 4 0Z","key":"l2t8xc"}],["path",{"d":"M16 17h4","key":"1dejxt"}],["path",{"d":"M4 13h4","key":"1bwh8b"}]],"className":"lucide-footprints w-6 h-6 text-[#d97706]"}],"$Le"]}],"$Lf","$L10","$L11"]}],"$L12"]}]]}],"$L13"]}],null,"$L14"]}]

1b:I[97367,["/_next/static/chunks/14ssjy1ety78q.js","/_next/static/chunks/0d3shmwh5_nmn.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
e:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold","children":"Customer Flow Design"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Customers enter, grab a basket, browse shelves, and head to checkout. Your job is to make that path as smooth as possible."}]
10:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"The \"loop\" layout works best for small-to-medium stores: entrance on one side, checkout on the opposite side, and shelves arranged in a U-shape or grid between them. This forces customers to walk past the maximum number of products."}]
11:["$","div",null,{"className":"p-4 rounded-sm bg-[#f6f8f7] border border-[#e5e7eb]","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-semibold mb-2","children":"Impulse Zone"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] text-sm","children":"Place small, cheap items (candy, gum, magazines) on a shelf directly next to the checkout register. Customers waiting in line often grab these, adding extra profit with zero extra effort."}]]}]
12:["$","section",null,{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4","children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3","key":"1dcmit"}],["path",{"d":"M21 8V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-3","key":"1e4gt3"}],["path",{"d":"M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3","key":"wsl5sc"}],["path",{"d":"M16 21h3a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-3","key":"18trek"}]],"className":"lucide-maximize w-6 h-6 text-[#d97706]"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold","children":"Expansion Order"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Store expansions are expensive. Expand in this order to maximize return on investment:"}],["$","ol",null,{"className":"space-y-3 text-[#5a6370] list-decimal list-inside","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"More shelves"}]," — Cheapest upgrade. More shelf slots = more products = more revenue."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Freezer unit"}]," — Unlocks frozen foods and ice cream, a high-margin category."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Floor expansion"}]," — Only when your current floor is packed wall-to-wall with shelves."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Decorations & lighting"}]," — Nice-to-have. Upgrade last, after revenue is stable."]}]]}]]}]
